{
  Item1:
//! This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
//! Structure: Conditional
#![allow(non_camel_case_types)]
#![allow(unused_parens)]
#![allow(missing_docs)]
#![allow(unused_imports)]
#![allow(unused_variables)]
#![allow(unused_unsafe)]
use std::ptr;

fn GetCharAt(value: &str, index: usize) -> char { value.as_bytes()[index] as char }

fn GetCharFromEnd(value: &str, from_end: usize) -> char {
    let bytes = value.as_bytes();
    bytes[bytes.len() - 1 - from_end] as char
}

fn GetLength(value: &str) -> i32 { value.len() as i32 }


pub struct MyData;
impl MyData {

    #[must_use]
    pub fn contains(key: &str) -> bool {
        let mut getLength: i32;
        let mut getCharFromEnd: char;
        let mut getCharAt: char;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength > 5))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getCharFromEnd = GetCharFromEnd(key, 0);
        if ((getCharFromEnd > '2'))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getCharAt = GetCharAt(key, 0);
        if ((getCharAt > 't'))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((getCharAt < 't'))
        {
         return false;
        }


        if key == "test1" || key == "test2" {
            return true;
        }

        false
    }

    pub const ITEM_COUNT: usize = 2;
    pub const MIN_KEY_LENGTH: i32 = 5;
    pub const MAX_KEY_LENGTH: i32 = 5;
    pub const HAS_NUMBER: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_UPPERCASE: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_LOWERCASE: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_SYMBOL: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_WHITESPACE: bool = false;
}
,
  Item2: 
}
